title: disa virginalis
intro: Disa virginalis, also known as the 'Queen of the Mountain', is a species of orchid native to the mountains of South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Disa virginalis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from coughs and colds. Disa virginalis can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the plant's roots and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture by soaking the plant in a solvent like ethanol.
